retrieved_result: Wildlife in Utah Wildlife in Utah Utah's diverse climate and terrain is home to over 600 species of mammals, birds, fish, reptiles and amphibians. Naturalists, pack your rucksacks with field journals and your best pair of binoculars. Settle in, and enjoy our other citizens. Read more... Discover Destinations Rare Si
